allow: PowerShell($dll = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.nuget\\packages\\workflowengine.netcore-providerformssql\\21.0.0\\lib\\netstandard2.0\\OptimaJet.Workflow.MSSQL.dll"; $asm = [Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\($dll\); try { $asm.GetExportedTypes\(\) | Select FullName } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ } | Select FullName })
